title: tarenna ciliolata
intro: Tarenna ciliolata, also known as the "Hairy Tarenna," is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Tarenna ciliolata include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and providing relief from digestive problems. Tarenna ciliolata can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
